title: sapium lanceolatum
intro: Sapium lanceolatum, also known as the lance-leaf stinking gum, is a plant species native to Australia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Sapium lanceolatum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
